title: STM32 Low-power modes
description: STM32 Low-power modes documents low power modes material for STM32 in the hardware domain. It is classified as an operation page for the mcu-family class, so readers can understand its topic, scope, and place in the wiki taxonomy. The page highlights Overview, Power consumption range, Modes, Standby with RTC Alarm, and Pinout & Configuration, with examples, commands, diagrams, or references kept close to the relevant explanation. Important search terms include stm32cubemx, stm32cubeide, low-power, stm32 low-power modes, and low-power-modes, helping both humans and generated indexes connect this page with adjacent concepts. The route is hardware / stm32 / low-power-modes, and the frontmatter keeps the canonical subject, ontology role, and navigation context aligned with repository validation.
